compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to do
Create tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh — RED tests for the enforcement hook.

## Tests (using temp git repo to stage files)
- test_unannotated_blocks: stage file under plugins/dso/ containing plugins/dso → hook exits 1
- test_outside_plugins_dso_ignored: stage file in tests/ containing plugins/dso → hook exits 0
- test_clean_file_passes: stage clean file under plugins/dso/ → hook exits 0
- test_error_message_actionable: blocked output includes file, line number, and fix guidance
- test_no_suppression_mechanism: hook source has NO grep -v and NO annotation pass-through logic

NOTE: There is NO "annotated line passes" test — there is no suppression mechanism.

## Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh (chmod +x)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh
- [ ] Contains at least 5 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh | awk "{exit (\$1 < 5)}"
- [ ] Tests FAIL before hook exists
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-plugin-self-ref-hook.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
